title: Reinstallation Network Issues
body:
### Issue Description

After uninstalling Podman, WSL2 and removing all local files, I attempted to reinstall Podman using the recent exe installer. I made sure to run as admin. 
After I receive the error, the default-machine is not functioning.
Have tried this several times with no luck. Any chance this is a configuration or uninstallation issue? I am hesitant to believe this is a system network issue since I had it working the other day. Please let me know of any steps I should take.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue (running as admin)
1. Install podman
2. Uninstall podman, remove local files
3. Disable VM and containers features
4. Uninstall WSL using apps\features.
5. net stop winnat
    net start winnat

6. Reboot
7. wsl --install (As admin)
8. Reinstall podman using exe (As admin)
9.  Run podman machine init

### Describe the results you received

After running podman machine init, I am receiving the following error:
The operation completed successfully.
Configuring system...
Generating public/private ed25519 key pair.
Your identification has been saved in podman-machine-default
Your public key has been saved in podman-machine-default.pub
The key fingerprint is:
SHA256:rGw/7Fza5YNJZ+gUzipOSTpcATVuzlpocKXDYJ52Gzk root@xxxxx
The key's randomart image is:
Removed art...
+----[SHA256]-----+
Error: cannot overwrite connection

### Describe the results you expected

The podman-machine-default container to start run as expected.

### podman info output

```yaml
Podman version: 4.6.2
Windows version: 10 Pro 22H2 19045.3324
```


### Podman in a container

No. Running on WSL2
Host machine is bare metal

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Domain joined local machine.

### Additional information

Occurs after reinstallation

comments.body: what does `podman system connection ls` produce?
FWIW, Iam speculating that the system connection was not removed when things were deleted the first time.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
You will need to delete the connections
